audit_access_log.basis: never auto-pruned (floor 1 yr) — PHIA s.63 + NS Reg s.11(3)

clinical_note.basis: 10 yr — the clinical record (PHIA s.50 core)

consent_events.basis: never auto-pruned — consent evidence must outlive the record it gates

diarize_stats.basis: 180 d rolling — PHI-FREE ML telemetry, not a clinical record

encounter_audio_sealed.basis: 10 yr from last activity — clinical-record norm / CMPA / dispute protection

retention_events.basis: never auto-pruned — proof-of-destruction must be permanent (s.50)

voice_presets.basis: until superseded / re-enroll — biometric embedding, not per-encounter PHI
